name: qa360
description: QA360 SaaS - Website Testing Tool (Backend + Frontend)

scripts.build:frontend: cd dashboard && rmdir /s /q node_modules 2>nul && rmdir /s /q build 2>nul && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:full: npm run build:frontend && echo '✅ Full build complete. Backend serves dashboard/build statically'
scripts.test:local: npm run build:full && echo '🚀 Starting at http://localhost:8080' && cd backend && npm start
